title: KeyBindCommand
description: Mod for creating your own key bindings for commands
body:
# **Mod** for creating your own key bindings for commands
The mod is available for Forge 1.20.1
## Commands:

```
* /bindkey <key> <commands>
* /bindlist (shows your key bindings)
* /unbind (after typing the command, press the key you want to unbind)
```
### Installation
Place the mod into the mods folder
Launch Minecraft with Forge 1.20.1
And you use the mod by binding commands to keys
